scripts.install:all: npm ci && npm ci --prefix server && npm ci --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run install:all && npm run db:up && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.check: node --check scripts/dev.js && node --check scripts/ensure-env.js && npm --prefix server run check && npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix client run build
